keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Aruba 0, Haiti 1. Danley Jean Jacques (Haiti) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Aruba 0, Haiti 2. Frantzdy Pierrot (Haiti) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Danley Jean Jacques.
First Half ends, Aruba 0, Haiti 2.
Substitution, Haiti. Léverton Pierre replaces Christopher Attys.
Substitution, Haiti. Duckens Nazon replaces Dany Jean.
Penalty saved. Roviën Ostiana (Aruba) right footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Johny Placide (Haiti).
Substitution, Aruba. Javier Jiménez replaces Terence Groothusen.
Substitution, Haiti. Ruben Providence replaces Fafá Picault.
Substitution, Aruba. Isaï Marselia replaces Alljereau Mercera.
Goal! Aruba 0, Haiti 3. Ruben Providence (Haiti) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Aruba 0, Haiti 4. Duckens Nazon (Haiti) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Haiti. Mondy Prunier replaces Louicius Deedson because of an injury.
Substitution, Haiti. Téo Michel replaces Frantzdy Pierrot.
Substitution, Aruba. Jaybrien Romano replaces Stiven Melchor Rua.
Substitution, Aruba. Ezekiel Frans replaces Dimaggio Senchi.
Roviën Ostiana (Aruba) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Aruba. Edhyon Hersilia replaces Diederick Luydens.
Goal! Aruba 0, Haiti 5. Mondy Prunier (Haiti) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Duckens Nazon.
Second Half ends, Aruba 0, Haiti 5.
